description: Once Upon a Katamari is a game where you roll up everything

v0.1.0.description:
Initial beta release
See the [README](https://github.com/ItsSeafoamy/Once-Upon-an-Archipelago/blob/main/README.md) for more info and setup instructions
v0.1.0.title: v0.1.0

v0.2.0.description:
This update is compatible with worlds generated using v0.1.0. It is strongly encouraged for anyone still playing in a v0.1.0 archipelago to update their mod.

## Additions
- Tag, You're It! levels are now obtainable.
- Added freebies to the item pool. In addition to the vanilla singleplayer freebies, this also includes the Mushroom, which increases your katamari's size by 10%, and Ice Axes, which allow you to scale walls much higher and faster. Enable these in your yaml if you want to include them. There is also an optional chance to include super variants of freebies. Super mushrooms increase your katamari's size by 20%, whereas all other super freebies last twice as long as their standard variant.
- You can now choose how many levels you start with. You will always start with "Tutorial" and "As Large As Possible 1". "As Fast As Possible 1" is no longer a required starting level.
- Select scroll tracker. Open your select scroll to see what checks you have completed in each level. A katamari icon is used to show you've completed the Level Clear check. 
- Deathlink

## Fixes
- The present on "As Large As Possible 4" would not grant its check.
- If both "As Large As Possible (Sea)" and "As Fast As Possible (Ghost Ship)" were both owned, then "As Fast As Possible (Ghost Ship)" may have been inaccessible.
- The game would softlock when attempting to use the cousin customizer. If attempting to upgrade an existing v0.1.0 save, this will still softlock, unless you start a new save file. All other fixes listed here should work on v0.1.0 worlds.

See the [README](https://github.com/ItsSeafoamy/Once-Upon-an-Archipelago/blob/main/README.md) for more info and setup instructions.
v0.2.0.title: v0.2.0

v0.2.1.description:
This is a mod only update. The apworld remains unchanged from v0.2.0.

## Fixes
- Receiving a deathlink while not in a level would trigger an infinite loading screen upon attempting to enter a level. Additional checks were also added against other potentially unsafe states when applying deathlink.
- Attempting to pick up a freebie ingame while the mushroom animation was still active would result in the new freebie being deleted without you receiving it.

See the [README](https://github.com/ItsSeafoamy/Once-Upon-an-Archipelago/blob/main/README.md) for more info and setup instructions.
v0.2.1.title: v0.2.1
